name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card := by
  apply Finset.card_image_le

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := Set.empty_subset s

theorem empty_subset_finset {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (s : Finset α) : ∅ ⊆ s := Finset.empty_subset s

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

theorem bool_not_not_simple (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  match b with
  | Bool.false => rfl
  | Bool.true => rfl

example (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card := by
  apply Finset.card_image_le

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm (A B : Finset ℕ) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not : ∀ (b : Bool), !!b = b := by
  intro b
  cases b <;> rfl

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := Set.empty_subset s

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone {a b : ℕ} (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by decide) h

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem my_pow_add (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n >= 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  decide

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

open Fintype

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  rw [← card_fin n, ← card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β]
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) (f : α → β) :
    ∃ x₁ x₂ : α, x₁ ≠ x₂ ∧ f x₁ = f x₂ :=
  Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt f h

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < 2^n := by
  apply Nat.pow_pos
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

-- Alternative shorter proof using `positivity` tactic:
-- theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < 2^n := by positivity

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
    {f : α → β} {g : β → γ} (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) :
    StrictMono (g ∘ f) := StrictMono.comp hg hf

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) : ∀ (s : Finset ℕ), s.card = n → (s.powerset).card = 2^n := by
  intro s hs
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]
  rw [hs]

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset ℕ) (h : s.card = n) : (s.powerset).card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, h]

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) :
    (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) :=
  Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < 2^n := by
  positivity

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b
